=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0-beta.27

/.src/returnEffectInGen.ts(4,3): suggestion TS377014: You are returning an Effect-able type inside a generator function, and will result in nested Effect<Effect<...>>.
Maybe you wanted to return yield* instead?
Nested Effect-able types may be intended if you plan to later manually flatten or unwrap this Effect, if so you can safely disable this diagnostic for this line through quickfixes. effect(returnEffectInGen)


==== /.src/returnEffectInGen.ts (1 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const shouldWarn = Effect.gen(function*() {
      return Effect.fail("error")
      ~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377014: You are returning an Effect-able type inside a generator function, and will result in nested Effect<Effect<...>>.
Maybe you wanted to return yield* instead?
Nested Effect-able types may be intended if you plan to later manually flatten or unwrap this Effect, if so you can safely disable this diagnostic for this line through quickfixes. effect(returnEffectInGen)
    })
